algorithm.title: 累積和
尺取り法
BFSテンプレート
カエルDP
トポロジカルソート
グリッドBFS
algorithm.code:
from collections import deque

dist = [[-1] * w for _ in range(h)]
q = deque([(sy, sx)])
dist[sy][sx] = 0
while q:
    y, x = q.popleft()
    for dy, dx in ((1, 0), (-1, 0), (0, 1), (0, -1)):
        ny, nx = y + dy, x + dx
        if not (0 <= ny < h and 0 <= nx < w):
            continue
        if grid[ny][nx] == "#" or dist[ny][nx] != -1:
            continue
        dist[ny][nx] = dist[y][x] + 1
        q.append((ny, nx))
